title: Globe Life (GL) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates on Improved Premiums
text: Globe Life (GL) expects net operating income between $10.49 per share and $10.65 per share for 2023.

title: Globe Life (GL) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Globe Life (GL) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.71 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.65 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.15 per share a year ago.

title: Compared to Estimates, Globe Life (GL) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Globe Life (GL) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: GLOBE LIFE INC. REPORTS THIRD QUARTER 2023 RESULTS
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) reported today that for the quarter ended September 30, 2023, net income was $2.68 per diluted common share, compared with $1.94 per diluted common share for the year-ago quarter. Net operating income for the quarter was $2.71 per diluted common share, compared with $2.19 per diluted common share for the year-ago quarter.

title: GLOBE LIFE INC. ANNOUNCES THIRD QUARTER 2023 EARNINGS RELEASE AND CONFERENCE CALL
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Oct. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) will release Third Quarter 2023 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, October 25, 2023. At that time, a copy of the Company's Third Quarter 2023 earnings press release and any other financial and statistical information about the quarter will be available on the Company's website at https://investors.globelifeinsurance.com/ under Financial Reports and Other Financial Information.

title: Globe Life (GL) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Globe Life (GL) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: GLOBE LIFE ACQUIRES EVRY HEALTH
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Oct. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) announced it has signed an agreement to acquire Evry Health. Founded in 2017, Evry Health is a business-to-business health insurance company that differentiates itself from traditional PPOs and HMOs by lowering the cost of healthcare through software automation with a mobile-first experience.

title: Warren Buffett Relies On 8 Stocks Now That Apple Is Crumbling
